subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Dec 14th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 14th, 2025

subject: Underdark cave
fact: The party found a defensible cave with a single entrance in the Underdark.
source_quote: the party stumbled upon a defensible cave with a single entrance

subject: alarm trap setup
fact: The party set up an improvised alarm trap with string and metal at the cave entrance.
source_quote: they set up an improvised alarm trap with string and metal at the entrance

subject: long rest
fact: The party took eight uneventful hours of rest in the cave.
source_quote: After eight uneventful hours of rest

subject: scream discovery
fact: A ragged scream choked off echoed from the tunnels ahead after the rest.
source_quote: a ragged scream suddenly choked off echoed from the tunnels ahead

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a filthy, traumatized commoner found standing protectively over Drystan.
source_quote: a woman named Teegan protectively standing over a man named Drystan

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is a traumatized commoner sitting rocking and clutching his knees with dried blood pooling near his ears.
source_quote: who sat rocking and clutching his knees

subject: lash marks observation
fact: Both Teegan and Drystan bore visible lash marks and torn clothing.
source_quote: Both bore visible lash marks and torn clothing

subject: ear wounds observation
fact: Dried blood pooled near Drystan from wounds in his ears.
source_quote: dried blood pooled near Drystan from wounds in his ears

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Teegan accused the party of working with their captor, Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Teegan initially accused the party of working with their captor, Maram il Vass

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: Two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind and howled about recapturing the pets.
source_quote: two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind, howling about recapturing "the pets"

subject: demon defeat
fact: The party cut through the demons, watching as they dissolved into dust and ochre upon defeat.
source_quote: watching as the demons dissolved into dust and ochre upon defeat

subject: enslavement revelation
fact: Teegan revealed she and Drystan had been enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs.
source_quote: She and Drystan had been enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs

subject: escape timing
fact: Teegan and Drystan escaped only a day ago while being led out to feed on mushrooms.
source_quote: They had escaped only a day ago while being led out to feed on mushrooms

subject: Drow prisoner
fact: Teegan confirmed that a Drow had been brought to Maram's palace.
source_quote: Teegan confirmed that a Drow had indeed been brought to Maram's palace

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deceptively polite deep gnome who guards the palace.
source_quote: Gabberforth, a deceptively polite deep gnome who guarded the palace

subject: Drystan self-harm
fact: Drystan drove a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment.
source_quote: he had driven a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment

subject: party level up
fact: The party reached 11th level and gained new abilities.
source_quote: The party's efforts were rewarded with newfound strength and abilities

subject: travel to palace
fact: After another day's travel, the party emerged from the tunnels into a vast cavern.
source_quote: After another day's travel, they emerged from the tunnels into a vast cavern

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The palace is an impressive structure of black and red marble with domes lit by fairy fire.
source_quote: an impressive structure of black and red marble, its domes lit by eerie blue, green, and purple fairy fire

subject: brass doors
fact: The palace entrance features ornate brass doors carved with images of a half-elf's rise to power.
source_quote: At the ornate brass doors carved with images of a half-elf's rise to power

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth and his shield guardian met the party at the brass doors.
source_quote: they were met by Gabberforth and his shield guardian

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth demanded to know the party's business.
source_quote: The deep gnome demanded to know their business

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: A rakishly handsome half-elf sat behind a desk of unusual purple wood in the grand chamber.
source_quote: a rakishly handsome half-elf sat behind a desk of unusual purple wood

subject: True Seeing cast
fact: Bramgrim invoked his sight beyond sight, causing the illusion to shatter.
source_quote: The moment Bramgrim invoked his sight beyond sight, the illusion shattered

subject: Yugoloth
fact: The half-elf was revealed as a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth demon with demonic jaws and claws.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth, a demon of contracts and deals, with demonic jaws and claws

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass identified Felkur and mentioned a group that believes Felkur stole from them.
source_quote: identifying Felkur and the troubles with those who believed he had stolen from them

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Maram confirmed he held a prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this, acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: Maram confirmed he held a prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this, acquired from fire giants

subject: trade offer Felkur
fact: Maram offered to trade Xaven Tanor'this for Felkur himself.
source_quote: he would trade Xaven Tanor'this for Felkur himself

subject: trade offer Bramgrim
fact: When the party refused, Maram suggested trading Bramgrim instead.
source_quote: When the party vehemently refused, he suggested Bramgrim instead

subject: monetary demand
fact: Maram revealed his true price was ten thousand gold pieces or two rare magical items.
source_quote: Maram then revealed his true price: ten thousand gold pieces or two rare magical items

subject: privacy negotiation
fact: The party requested time to deliberate privately and negotiated terms for a contract ensuring their privacy.
source_quote: The party requested time to deliberate privately, and after careful negotiation over the terms of a contract ensuring their privacy

subject: side office access
fact: Maram reluctantly agreed to let the party use his side office.
source_quote: Maram reluctantly agreed to let them use his side office

subject: back room demons
fact: Two more demons emerged from the back room as the party prepared to enter the side office.
source_quote: two more demons emerged from the back room

subject: Xaven Tanor'this location
fact: Teegan did not know the exact location of the Drow prisoner within the palace.
source_quote: though she didn't know his exact location

subject: Felkur's theft problem
fact: A group believes Felkur stole something from them, a problem Maram knows about.
source_quote: a particular group that seems to think you stole something

subject: fake magical items
fact: Felkur considered using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur considers infusing armor with a +2 bonus and decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass initially appears as a rakishly handsome half-elf.
source_quote: A 'rakishly handsome' half-elf sits at the desk.

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Bramgrim casts True Seeing to reveal that the half-elf is actually a Yugoloth.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts True Seeing, revealing that the 'half-elf' is actually a Yugoloth

subject: Yugoloth
fact: Maram il Vass is a Yugoloth, a type of demon known for making contracts.
source_quote: a Yugoloth, a type of demon known for making contracts

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass immediately identifies Felkur and knows about a group that wants him.
source_quote: immediately identifies Felkur, knowing about a group that wants him

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass confirms he has the Drow named Xaven in his custody.
source_quote: Maram confirms he has the Drow named Xaven

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass states he acquired Xaven from fire giants.
source_quote: whom he acquired from fire giants

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven for Felkur.
source_quote: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven for Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven for 10,000 gold pieces or two rare magical items.
source_quote: Maram il Vass then offers Xaven for 10,000 gold pieces or two rare magical items

subject: Bramgrim
fact: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim vehemently refuses the trade of Felkur.
source_quote: Bramgrim vehemently refusing

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that last eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan was enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs.
source_quote: enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan shares vital information about Maram il Vass and the Drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this after the demons are defeated.
source_quote: after they defeat the demons, she shares vital information about Maram il Vass, the Drow prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan refuses to follow the party further into the palace.
source_quote: She refuses to follow the party further into the palace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is found in a state of mental breakdown with self-inflicted wounds from shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears.
source_quote: shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears, causing self-inflicted wounds

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is unable to communicate.
source_quote: He is unable to communicate

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deep gnome who serves as a guard and majordomo for Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A deep gnome who serves as a guard and majordomo for Maram il Vass

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth guards the entrance to the palace accompanied by a shield guardian.
source_quote: accompanied by a shield guardian

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A shield guardian stands sentry at the entrance to Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: A construct that stands sentry at the entrance to Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Barlgura
fact: Two Barlgura demons ambushed the party and were interested in recapturing Teegan and Drystan.
source_quote: Two ugly-looking demons that ambushed the party, interested in recapturing Teegan and Drystan

subject: Barlgura
fact: The Barlgura demons were defeated by the party and turned into dust and ochre.
source_quote: They were defeated by the party and turned into dust and ochre

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was attacked and knocked prone during the battle with the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: it was attacked and knocked prone

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear recovered using its second wind.
source_quote: recovered using its second wind

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear levels up with the party to 11th level.
source_quote: It levels up with the party to 11th level

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is an expansive cavern housing Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: An expansive cavern housing Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The palace is a grand structure of black and red marble lit by blue, green, and purple fairy fire.
source_quote: a grand structure of black and red marble, lit by blue, green, and purple fairy fire

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The central building of the palace stands 50 feet high.
source_quote: The central building stands 50 feet high

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The interior of the palace is filled with expensive incense and perfume.
source_quote: The interior is filled with expensive incense and perfume

subject: Entrance Foyer
fact: The entrance foyer features two large tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power.
source_quote: featuring two large tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power

subject: Entrance Foyer
fact: The entrance foyer hallway is lined with tall vases of fresh flowers and glass containers holding small, unusual creatures.
source_quote: hallway lined with tall vases of fresh flowers and glass containers holding small, unusual creatures

subject: Grand Chamber
fact: The Grand Chamber has a polished white marble floor streaked with red and black.
source_quote: The floor is polished white marble streaked with red and black

subject: Grand Chamber
fact: A large desk of unusual purple wood sits in the middle of the Grand Chamber.
source_quote: A large desk of unusual purple wood sits in the middle of the grand chamber

subject: Grand Chamber
fact: Two brass doors in the Grand Chamber lead to the southeast and southwest corners.
source_quote: two brass doors lead to southeast and southwest corners

subject: Side Office
fact: Maram il Vass offers a side office for the party to discuss their negotiation privately.
source_quote: offering a side office

subject: Cave (Resting Spot)
fact: The party takes a long rest in a defensible cave with a single entrance found by Bramgrim.
source_quote: where the party takes a long rest

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are a section of Underdark tunnels characterized by persistent, mournful winds.
source_quote: characterized by persistent, mournful winds

subject: Alarm Trap
fact: The party set up an improvised alarm trap made of string and a loud metal item at the cave entrance.
source_quote: An improvised trap made of string and a loud metal item, set up by the party at the entrance of the cave

subject: Pointed Stick
fact: Drystan shoved a pointed stick into both of his ears while in a maddened state.
source_quote: tragically shoved it into both of his ears

subject: Brass Doors
fact: The Brass Doors are the only entrance to Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: serving as the only entrance to Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Brass Doors
fact: The Brass Doors are carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf.
source_quote: carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf

subject: Tapestries
fact: Two large tapestries in the entrance foyer depict the story of a self-made half-elf.
source_quote: depicting the story of a self-made half-elf of extraordinary influence

subject: Vases with Fresh Flowers
fact: Tall vases in the palace hallway are filled with fresh flowers.
source_quote: filled with fresh flowers

subject: Glass Containers
fact: Glass containers in the palace hallway hold various small and unusual creatures such as fish, birds, and reptiles.
source_quote: filled with various small and unusual creatures such as fish, birds, reptiles

subject: Desk of Purple Wood
fact: A large desk of unusual purple wood is situated in the middle of the grand chamber.
source_quote: A large desk of unusual purple wood sits in the middle of the grand chamber

subject: Contract
fact: Maram il Vass presents a contract for the party's privacy agreement.
source_quote: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement

subject: Contract
fact: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram will not spy on them.
source_quote: negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them

subject: True Seeing
fact: Bramgrim casts True Seeing to reveal Maram il Vass's true form as a Yugoloth.
source_quote: revealing the true nature of things. It lasted for one hour and was used to reveal Maram il Vass's true form as a Yugoloth

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fourth level during combat with the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fourth level during combat with the Barlgura demons

subject: Phantasmal Killer
fact: A Barlgura demon casts Phantasmal Killer on Daein.
source_quote: Cast by a Barlgura demon on Daein

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas casts Hunter's Mark on one of the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas on one of the Barlgura demons

subject: Toll the Dead
fact: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on a Barlgura demon.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on a Barlgura demon

subject: Volley
fact: Akritas gains the Volley ability upon leveling up to 11th level.
source_quote: A new ability gained by Akritas upon leveling up to 11th level

subject: True Seeing
fact: True Seeing lasts for one hour.
source_quote: It lasts for one hour

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a Drow held captive by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A Drow held captive by Maram il Vass

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was brought to Maram il Vass by fire giants while unconscious and in bad shape.
source_quote: brought to him by fire giants while unconscious and in bad shape

subject: Privacy negotiation
fact: The party requests time to discuss and decide which rare items to offer.
source_quote: The party requests time to discuss and decide which rare items to offer

subject: Privacy agreement
fact: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to give the party privacy.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to their privacy

subject: Demon reveal
fact: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room as the party prepares to enter the side office.
source_quote: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room as the party prepares to enter the side office

subject: Felkur's problem
fact: Maram il Vass offers to help Felkur with his problem in exchange for something.
source_quote: Maram offers to help Felkur with his problem in exchange for something

subject: Rare items offer
fact: The party is deciding which rare items to offer for Xaven.
source_quote: decide which rare items to offer
